para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 在执行机床安装，操作和维护工作时，一定要保护身体免受以下潜在危害影响。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:47px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

para.style: text-align:justify; margin-top:11px; line-height:1.18;
para.text: 一定要使用保护装置保护身体免受这些危险的影响。以下为保护设备样例。

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:#dddddd; alt-row-background-color:none;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:16px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:16px left ;
li.text: 零件或其他物品会掉落在头上的工作

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:17px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:16px; line-height:1.03; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:16px left ;
li.text: 头部会受到撞击的工作

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:2px; margin-right:6px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:5px; line-height:1.03; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:6px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:7px; line-height:1.03; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:3px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:5px; line-height:1.03; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 灰尘，碎屑，碎片或其他物质飞出

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:5px; line-height:1.03; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 油雾，润滑剂，润滑油或其他油品飞溅

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:54px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:5px; line-height:1.03; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

li.text: 物品会喷出火花飞出的工作

li.text: 工作环境总是会产生超过法律规定声压级噪音的工作

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:2px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

para.text: 割伤，烧伤或沾上了化学物质

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:2px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:5px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 保护手套，耐热手套，耐化学手套
